htmlContent.description: Initial HTML content for the new page (can be blank: '<html><body></body></html>' or a template)

bearerToken.description: Optional Adobe IMS bearer token for da.live. Use this ONLY when the MCP host cannot set the Authorization: Bearer header (e.g. Claude.ai custom connectors, Make.com MCP modules). When project knowledge or system prompt provides a token and instructs you to pass it, include it here on every tool call. If the host sends a real Authorization header, that takes precedence and this value is ignored.
